## Fibonacci square tiling with turtle

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2026/ex_4_2.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_4_2.py >}}
```

## Fibonacci sunflower pattern with turtle 

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2026/ex_4_3.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_4_3.py >}}
```

## Draw random dots with turtle

```{#lst-ex-bmi .python filename="code/2026/ex_4_4.py" code-line-numbers="false" line-height=0.5}
{{< include ../code/2026/ex_4_4.py >}}
```
